content:
## Customer Report Intake
1. Use this handling path when a debit-card dispute is being worked as card-present fraud and the error-resolution category is within unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud.
2. If the customer describes a non-unauthorized error instead, do not apply the fraud liability tiers; the non-unauthorized error liability is 0.
3. Capture the date the customer discovered the issue before quoting liability, because the cap depends on when the report is made.

## Card Status Action
For card-present fraud, the required card action is close_and_reissue. Do not leave the existing card active after assigning this category. See "Internal: Debit Card Dispute Intake Requirements" for the intake facts that must be gathered before completing a dispute workflow.

## Liability Amounts
- Reported within 2 business days after discovery: maximum liability is 50.
- Reported after that period but still within the statement window: maximum liability is 500.
- Reported after the statement window: maximum liability is -1, meaning unlimited liability in this benchmark policy.

## Provisional Credit Fit
Card-present fraud is one of the categories that can receive provisional credit when the remaining provisional-credit requirements are satisfied. The full allowed category set is unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud, atm_cash_discrepancy, duplicate_charge. See "Debit Card Provisional Credit Policy" for the credit decision rules.
title: Internal: Card Present Fraud Handling
